generatedFrom: Microsoft Learn controls inventory and local component parity lab requirements

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: invoke alternate command and assert status
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: workbench navigation, selected row, command, and status names remain visible and non-private
knownGaps: Native Windows workbench coverage is present; macOS list/detail, command, and status chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: focused control exposes role, name, enabled state, and value where available
knownGaps: Native Windows focus coverage is present; macOS focus visuals are not production-rendered yet.
Native Windows disabled coverage is present; macOS disabled chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: checked controls expose checked state and name
knownGaps: Native Windows checked-state coverage is present; macOS check/radio glyphs are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: text input exposes role, name, value, and focus state
knownGaps: Native Windows TextBox focus coverage is present; macOS caret and focus visuals are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: validation message remains visible and is not color-only
knownGaps: Invalid state is represented with public text; native validation chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: select item and assert selected item
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: selected list row exposes selected state and item name
knownGaps: Native Windows selected-row coverage is present; macOS row and selection chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: command exposes role, name, icon metadata, and enabled state
knownGaps: Native Windows command invocation coverage is present; macOS command chrome is not production-rendered yet.
Native Windows disabled command coverage is present; macOS disabled command chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: open menu or flyout, invoke item, dismiss
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: popup/menu item names, expanded state, and accelerator text
knownGaps: Native Windows popup targets are visible; macOS popup host behavior is not implemented yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: open dialog or flyout, choose or dismiss
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: dialog/flyout title, body, button names, and popup relationship
knownGaps: Native Windows dialog/flyout targets are represented; macOS dialog and popup host behavior is not implemented yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: loading status remains visible and non-color-only
knownGaps: Native Windows loading coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressRing chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: error status includes visible text and severity, not color alone
knownGaps: Native Windows error coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressBar chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: click completion command and assert success status
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: success status includes visible text and severity, not color alone
knownGaps: Native Windows success coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressBar chrome are not production-rendered yet.

broaderControlInventory.description: Prioritized broader public WinUI 3 control promotion plan beyond the documented production subset. Each control stays a planned diagnostic row in 'entries' until it passes the same evidence gate used for Ring 0 and Ring 1 promotion. This inventory is a roadmap, not a local macOS support claim.
broaderControlInventory.promotionGate: facade behavior, XAML ingestion, layout, painter, component evidence, native WinUI reference, interaction evidence where applicable, accessibility export, docs, and tests, with no claimed not-rendered, poor, or weak rows.

controls.promotionExitCriteria: ToggleSwitch facade and XAML ingestion, on/off track-and-knob painter, component evidence, native reference, toggle interaction, accessibility toggle state, docs, and tests.
Slider facade and XAML ingestion, track/thumb/fill painter, value interaction, accessibility value state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
PasswordBox facade and XAML ingestion, masked-text painter and reveal affordance, focus interaction, accessibility protected-text state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
NumberBox facade and XAML ingestion, value field and spin-button painter, increment/validation interaction, accessibility value state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
AutoSuggestBox facade and XAML ingestion, text field and suggestion-list painter, suggestion open/select interaction, accessibility list state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
DropDownButton facade and XAML ingestion, chevron button and menu-open painter, open interaction, accessibility expanded state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
SplitButton facade and XAML ingestion, primary/secondary split painter, invoke and open interaction, accessibility split state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
ToggleSplitButton facade and XAML ingestion, checked split painter, toggle and open interaction, accessibility checked/expanded state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
MenuBar facade and XAML ingestion, top-level menu and submenu painter, open/invoke interaction, accessibility menu structure, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
Expander facade and XAML ingestion, header/chevron and expanded-content painter, expand/collapse interaction, accessibility expanded state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
TabView facade and XAML ingestion, tab strip and selected-tab painter, select/add/close interaction, accessibility tab selection, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
TreeView facade and XAML ingestion, indented node and expander painter, expand/select interaction, accessibility tree structure, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
GridView facade and XAML ingestion, wrapped item-grid and selected-item painter, selection interaction, accessibility grid selection, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
TeachingTip facade and XAML ingestion, callout/tail and content painter, open/dismiss interaction, accessibility teaching content, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
RatingControl facade and XAML ingestion, glyph rating painter, set/hover interaction, accessibility rating value, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
PersonPicture facade and XAML ingestion, circular initials/image painter, accessibility person name, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
CalendarView facade and XAML ingestion, month grid and selected-day painter, day-selection interaction, accessibility date state, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
DatePicker facade and XAML ingestion, field and spinner-flyout painter, open/select interaction, accessibility date value, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
TimePicker facade and XAML ingestion, field and spinner-flyout painter, open/select interaction, accessibility time value, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
ColorPicker facade and XAML ingestion, spectrum/sliders/preview painter, channel interaction, accessibility color value, component evidence, native reference, docs, and tests.
